name: Iron Sword
description: A plain iron blade. Free from rust. Free from flourish.

name: Long Sword
description: Fuller-ground for leverage. The extra reach adds up.

name: War Blade
description: Balanced for punishment. The edge never needed refinement.

name: Warlord's Cleaver
description: Hacked from a fallen champion's grip. Still hungry.

name: Crude Bow
description: Bent ash and twine. Reliable if you don't expect much.

name: Hunter's Bow
description: Recurve cut for field work. The pull is smooth if you know what you're doing.

name: Shadow Bow
description: Lacquered black. The string barely whispers.

name: Longbow
description: The draw weight alone disqualifies most. The ones left don't miss.

name: Gnarled Staff
description: Carved from a storm-struck oak. The knots don't matter; the current does.

name: Focusing Wand
description: A conductor for precise intent. Channels thought into impact.

name: Ley Staff
description: Taps something old in the earth. The current runs deeper than most realize.

name: Archmage's Focus
description: Shaped from years of accumulated intent. The staff barely contains it.

name: Iron Plate
description: Heavy beaten iron — keeps blows out.

name: Fitted Plate
description: The same iron — this time the stance that comes with it matters.

name: War Plate
description: Forged thick and tested. Doesn't crack.

name: Bulwark Plate
description: Passed down. The dents are from battles the previous owner survived.

name: Scale Mail
description: Overlapping plates — distributes impact more than it stops it.

name: Reinforced Scales
description: The underlay has been tightened. You feel the difference.

name: Dragon Scale
description: Harvested and fitted. Resistant to almost everything by default.

name: Elder Scale Coat
description: Each plate is a piece of something that outlasted most things.

name: Mystic Robe
description: Woven with channeling thread. Won't stop a blade but stops most else.

name: Warded Mantle
description: The ward is built in — you feel it the moment you put it on.

name: Arcane Vestment
description: The kind of enchantment that takes years and a particular kind of patience.

name: Sorcerer's Mantle
description: Whatever power it holds — it held it long before you found it.

name: Ring of Valor
description: Simple iron band — worn smooth from a fighter's grip.

name: Veteran's Ring
description: The same ring. Now the stance that comes with it matters.

name: Champion's Ring
description: Sized for a champion's finger. Proof that they survived.

name: Warlord's Signet
description: Passed through enough hands that the metal holds memory.

name: Scholar's Amulet
description: A small lens on a chain. Helps with focus more than it looks.

name: Seeker's Amulet
description: The inscription slows the eye down. That's the point.

name: Sage's Amulet
description: Two disciplines in one setting — thought and endurance.

name: Arcanist's Totem
description: Old enough that it predates the school that named it.

name: Iron Bracers
description: Hammered flat and strapped tight. Nothing more needed.

name: Hardened Bracers
description: The extra weight teaches the body to carry more.

name: Warden's Bracers
description: Thicker at the forearm. Built for weight.

name: Unbroken Vambraces
description: No dents — not from lack of use but from not staying dented.
